title: 我喜欢做...
prompt_en: Practice like/enjoy/hate + doing and want/need/hope + to do.
prompt_zh: 练习动名词和不定式的用法。
description: 掌握like+doing(动名词)和want+to do(不定式)的区分。
knowledge_points: 动名词 不定式 like doing want to do

title: 我想做/需要做
prompt_en: Practice would like/hope/need + to do polite expressions.
prompt_zh: 练习委婉表达意愿：would like / hope to / need to。
description: 掌握would like to和hope to等委婉表达。
knowledge_points: 委婉 意愿 would like hope to need to

title: 请你帮我...
prompt_en: Practice polite requests with Could Would and May I.
description: 掌握Could you / Would you / May I 三种礼貌请求。
knowledge_points: 礼貌请求 could would may please

title: 你想要...吗？
prompt_en: Practice offering and inviting with Would you like and Do you want.
prompt_zh: 练习邀请和提议：Would you like / Do you want / How about。
description: 掌握邀请和提议的各种表达方式。
knowledge_points: 邀请 提议 would you like how about

title: 我去过/做过
prompt_en: Practice present perfect with have been/done and ever/never.
prompt_zh: 练习现在完成时：have been to / have done / ever/never。
description: 掌握现在完成时表经历的基本用法。
knowledge_points: 完成时 have been to ever never 经历

title: 已经多久了
prompt_en: Practice present perfect with for since already yet just.
prompt_zh: 练习现在完成时的时间表达：for/since/already/yet/just。
knowledge_points: 完成时 for since already yet just 持续
